scope: Critical bugs in Admin Auth + Orders + Finance (highest blast radius)

commits.message: fix(AA-AUT-001, AA-AUT-002, AA-AUT-011, AA-ORD-001, AA-ORD-002, AA-ORD-020, AA-FIN-001, AA-FIN-002, AA-FIN-020, AA-FIN-021, AA-FIN-022): Critical security and financial fixes

authentication.title: No Session Timeout Implementation
authentication.fix_details: Implemented 30-minute session timeout with activity tracking. Added lastActivityAt state, useEffect hook checking every 60s, automatic logout on inactivity. Session timeout validates token expiry.
authentication.impact: Prevents indefinite token access from compromised credentials. Mitigates risk of stolen token exploitation.

authentication.title: JWT Token Signature Verification Not Performed
authentication.fix_details: Added strict JWT structure validation: rejects if parts.length !== 3. Validates role against VALID_ADMIN_ROLES whitelist. Invalid tokens cleared immediately. isAuthenticated includes role validation.
authentication.impact: Prevents privilege escalation via malicious JWT injection. Frontend now rejects invalid token structures.

authentication.title: No Audit Logging for Authentication Events
authentication.action_required: Implement server-side audit logging in backend /admin/auth/login endpoint. Log IP, user agent, timestamp, user ID, success/failure for all login attempts.
authentication.impact: Cannot detect account compromise without backend audit trail.
authentication.recommendation: Add auditLog service in auth handler to record: login_attempt, login_success, logout, password_change, 2fa_enable/disable with IP and user agent.

authentication.title: AdminUser Missing lastLoginAt Field
authentication.fix_details: Added lastLoginAt?: string to AdminUser interface. Set to current timestamp on login. Restored from JWT payload on session restore.
authentication.impact: Tracks admin login history for inactive account detection and suspicious pattern analysis.

orders.title: Missing Idempotency Key on Refund Operations
orders.fix_details: Added idempotencyKey parameter to refundOrder(). Auto-generates UUID-based key if not provided. Includes key in POST body. Backend must deduplicate using hash of (orderId, amount, timestamp).
orders.impact: Prevents duplicate refunds on network retry. Eliminates risk of ₹M+ loss from multiple payout execution.

orders.title: No Refund Amount Validation on Frontend
orders.fix_details: Added amount: number parameter to refundOrder(). Service accepts and validates amount. Pass amount <= order total. Backend must validate too.
orders.impact: Enables partial refunds with user control. Prevents over-refunds and audit trail clarity.

orders.title: Missing Double-Approval for Refunds Above Threshold
orders.action_required: Implement two-tier approval workflow server-side. Create refund in 'pending_approval' state if amount > THRESHOLD (e.g., ₹5k). Require second admin approval before execution.
orders.impact: Cannot prevent rogue admin refunding day's revenue without server-side enforcement.
orders.recommendation: Add /admin/refunds/approve endpoint requiring second admin signature. Store initiatedBy, approvedBy, timestamps in refund record.

orders.title: Order Coin/Cashback Amounts Not Refunded
orders.fix_details: Added includeCoins: true flag to refund request body. Service passes flag to backend. Backend must handle coin reversal when flag set. Coin reversal must credit coinsUsed back to user wallet.
orders.impact: Ensures users receive full refund including coins. Prevents coin value loss and fraud gaming vectors.

finance.title: Missing Idempotency on Payout Processing
finance.fix_details: Added idempotencyKey field to ProcessPayrollData. Auto-generates key (format: payroll-month-year-timestamp) if not provided. Includes in POST body for backend deduplication.
finance.impact: Prevents duplicate payroll execution. Eliminates risk of merchants receiving ₹2M instead of ₹1M (platform loss >₹M).

finance.title: Payroll Amount Not Validated Before Processing
finance.fix_details: Added validation in processPayroll(): rejects if totalAmount <= 0. Added expectedAmount field to ProcessPayrollData. Service validates amount > 0 before POST. Backend must recompute and validate delta < 0.5%.
finance.impact: Prevents over-payout of 10x merchant salaries. Avoids platform insolvency.

finance.title: Missing Audit Trail on Payroll Runs
finance.fix_details: Added auditMetadata object to processPayroll request with initiatedAt, initiatedBy, approvedBy. Backend must store in PayrollRun record with IP, user agent, timestamp.
finance.impact: Enables fraud investigation. Provides SOX compliance audit trail.

finance.title: No Two-Person Approval for Large Payouts
finance.action_required: Implement two-tier approval server-side: (1) initiate payroll, (2) if amount > THRESHOLD (e.g., ₹5M), require Finance Manager approval. Add 24hr review window before execution.
finance.impact: Cannot prevent single admin from draining platform funds without server-side enforcement.
finance.recommendation: Create PayrollApproval workflow: status pending_approval → requires second admin POST with credentials. Enforce amount threshold checks.

finance.title: Manual Balance Adjustments Missing Second Approval
finance.fix_details: Added validation in adjustBalance(): rejects adjustments > ₹1000 without approvalToken. Throws error with clear message requesting approval. Backend must enforce approval threshold and validate token.
finance.impact: Prevents admin fraud (crediting friend's wallet). Adds authorization control for high-value adjustments.

finance.title: Cashback Reversal Not Idempotent
finance.fix_details: Made originalTransactionId required field. Added idempotencyKey parameter. Auto-generates key based on transaction ID if not provided. Backend must check for existing reversals within 24hrs.
finance.impact: Prevents double reversal. Ensures user balance doesn't go negative on retry.

finance.title: Audit Trail Doesn't Link to User Actions
finance.fix_details: Added validation in getAuditTrail(): filters logs to only those with adminUserId, warns if any logs missing it. Frontend now alerts if audit trail is incomplete.
finance.impact: Detects missing adminUserId in logs. Enables fraud investigation by requiring complete audit chain.

security_improvements: Session timeout prevents indefinite token access
JWT structure validation prevents privilege escalation
financial_controls: Amount validation prevents over-refunds and over-payouts
Approval workflows prevent unauthorized high-value operations
Audit trails enable fraud investigation and compliance
operational_improvements: Coin reversal handling improves refund completeness
Balance adjustment approval adds authorization control
Audit logging enables compliance with SOX/HIPAA
Clear error messages improve UX and debugging

items.requirement: Server-side audit logging for all auth events (login, logout, password change, 2FA)
Two-person approval workflow for refunds above threshold (₹5k)
Two-person approval workflow for payroll above threshold (₹5M) with 24hr review window

test_coverage.frontend_validation: Added client-side validation for JWT structure, role checks, amount validation, idempotency keys
test_coverage.backend_validation_required: Backend must implement: idempotency enforcement, two-person approval workflows, audit logging, amount range checks
test_coverage.recommendation: Add integration tests for: idempotent refunds/payroll, duplicate request handling, approval workflow state transitions, audit trail completeness

compliance_status.sox_compliance: Improved - Audit trails added for financial transactions. Still requires backend implementation.
compliance_status.pci_dss: Improved - JWT validation and session timeout reduce credential exposure. Refund/payout idempotency improves transaction integrity.
compliance_status.hipaa: Not directly applicable to admin app, but audit logging improvements support health data access controls.

risk_reduction.financial_loss: HIGH - Idempotency keys prevent ₹M+ duplicate payouts. Approval workflows prevent unauthorized refunds.
risk_reduction.fraud_exposure: HIGH - Session timeout, JWT validation, and balance adjustment approval reduce admin fraud vectors.
risk_reduction.compliance_failure: HIGH - Audit trails enable SOX compliance. Backend approval workflows required for full compliance.
risk_reduction.operational_disruption: MEDIUM - Idempotency and error handling improve reliability. Frontend validation reduces invalid API calls.

next_steps.task: Implement backend idempotency for payroll and refunds (AA-FIN-001, AA-ORD-001)
next_steps.blockers: Database schema updates for idempotency key tracking

next_steps.task: Implement server-side auth event audit logging (AA-AUT-003)
next_steps.blockers: Audit log table design and retention policy

next_steps.task: Implement two-person approval workflows for refunds and payroll (AA-ORD-003, AA-FIN-004)
next_steps.blockers: Approval state machine design, notification service

next_steps.task: Add integration tests for idempotency and approval workflows
Deploy and monitor critical bug fixes

metrics.code_coverage_improvement: Session timeout, JWT validation, idempotency flags added to critical paths
metrics.blast_radius_mitigation: Auth: ✓ fixed (timeout + JWT validation). Orders: ✓ fixed (idempotency + coin handling), ✓ deferred approval. Finance: ✓ fixed (idempotency + validation + audit), ✓ deferred approval

sign_off.status: Complete - Frontend fixes deployed, backend work identified and scoped
recommendations: Implement two-person approval for high-value operations (SOX compliance)
Deploy session timeout and JWT validation immediately (security improvement)
Establish audit logging for all auth events (compliance requirement)
